title: Apply animal welfare principles to handling and husbandry of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply animal welfare principles to handling and husbandry of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify animal welfare requirements

pcs.text: Identify legislative, regulatory and industry animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislative, regulatory and industry animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislative, regulatory and industry animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Identify the principles and practices of animal welfare
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the principles and practices of animal welfare?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the principles and practices of animal welfare.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify animal welfare requirements

elements.title: Comply with animal welfare requirements

pcs.text: Identify and apply workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Perform animal husbandry activities according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform animal husbandry activities according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform animal husbandry activities according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Recognise animal welfare issues and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise animal welfare issues and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise animal welfare issues and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Take appropriate corrective action as instructed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take appropriate corrective action as instructed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take appropriate corrective action as instructed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Record workplace animal welfare concerns and actions taken according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record workplace animal welfare concerns and actions taken according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record workplace animal welfare concerns and actions taken according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Comply with animal welfare requirements

elements.title: Participate in animal welfare process

pcs.text: Participate in animal welfare induction programs and training
